summary: Iteration 13: Review Request Email & Supabase Realtime Features - All tests passed. Backend: 7/7 tests (100%). Frontend: All UI tests passed. Review request email is triggered when order status changes to 'delivered' (verified in backend logs). Admin dashboard shows 'LIVE' indicator with Wifi icon and Live Feed section works.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py update_order_status (lines 1894-1936) correctly triggers send_review_request_email when status='delivered'
send_review_request_email function (lines 2067-2171) properly sends email via SMTP with product info and review link
Backend logs confirm emails sent: 'Review request email sent for order BCA63523 to test@droomvriendjes.nl'
AdminCommandCenterNew.jsx uses Supabase Realtime subscription for orders table with correct event handling
Supabase client correctly initialized in frontend/src/lib/supabase.js
Admin orders page has proper status dropdown with all options including 'Afgeleverd' (delivered)
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing orders for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Review email feature fully functional. Key endpoint: PUT /api/admin/orders/{order_id}/status with status='delivered' triggers review request email (check backend logs for 'Review request email sent'). Supabase Realtime integrated on admin dashboard - shows 'LIVE' when connected or 'Verbinden...' if Supabase publication not enabled. Polling fallback (10s) ensures live feed works regardless.

details: Backend logs show 'Review request email sent for order XXX to email@domain.com'
Email includes product names, order number, and review link
No review email triggered (review emails only on 'delivered')
Error message lists valid statuses: pending, paid, shipped, delivered, cancelled
Dashboard shows 'LIVE' indicator with Wifi icon next to 'Droomvriendjes'
Live Feed section displays recent orders with amounts
Supabase Realtime subscription active for orders table
Status dropdown shows all options: In afwachting, Betaald, Verzonden, Afgeleverd, Geannuleerd, Mislukt
Changing status to 'Afgeleverd' (delivered) shows success message
Status filter tabs work (Alles, In afwachting, Betaald, Verzonden, Afgeleverd, Geannuleerd)
